name: Arch (freestanding or doorway-style)
description: A single arch built inside a thin frame slab (typically 5x5x1): two @primary jambs flanking an open span, two @stairs blocks at the inner top corners facing inward to suggest the curve of the arch, a flat course of @primary closing the top, and an optional @accent keystone at the centre. The interior span is left as air so the arch can host a door, frame a path, or stand alone as a monumental gateway.

required_furniture.rule: Two @primary jambs, 1-2 cells wide each, full height-1, flanking the open span on the along-wall axis.
Two @stairs blocks at the inner top corners, facing inward toward the span centre so their slope reads as the curve of the arch.
Optional @accent block at the top-centre of the arch; toggled via `with_keystone` kwarg (default true).
Interior of the arch — between the two jambs and below the top course — is left as air; the skill places no blocks there.

placement_rules: Stairs create the curve at top corners
Top course of @primary closes the span jamb-to-jamb above the stairs
Wall axis is inferred from `facing` (north/south → arch slab runs along X; east/west → arch slab runs along Z), matching door_with_frame's convention
Defensive on AABBs from 3x3x1 up to 7x6x2 — out-of-range inputs return no ops or clamp to the supported envelope
lighting_ventilation: Arches are open structures — they admit full daylight and free airflow through the span. Pair with a lantern or torch above the keystone if used as a night gateway. When set into a perimeter wall the open span doubles as the primary light aperture of the room behind it.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone jambs with dark oak stair corbels and a stone-brick keystone — reads as a castle gate or postern.

modern.notes: Monolithic smooth-stone arch with matching stair curve — a minimalist civic gateway.

fantasy.notes: Purpur jambs and keystone with dark oak stair corbels — fits temples, end-themed portals, or wizard towers.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.arch.build(aabb, materials, style, *, facing='south', with_keystone=True) -> List[Op]
